title: Amaru Trace Schemas
description: JSON Schema definitions for all registered traces in Amaru

amaru::ledger::state::APPLY_BLOCK.name: apply_block
amaru::ledger::state::APPLY_BLOCK.description: Apply a block to stable state

amaru::ledger::state::CREATE_VALIDATION_.name: create_validation_context
amaru::ledger::state::CREATE_VALIDATION_.description: Create validation context for a block

amaru::ledger::state::FORWARD.name: forward
amaru::ledger::state::FORWARD.description: Forward ledger state with new volatile state

amaru::ledger::state::RESOLVE_INPUTS.name: resolve_inputs
amaru::ledger::state::RESOLVE_INPUTS.description: Resolve transaction inputs from various sources

amaru::ledger::state::ROLL_BACKWARD.name: roll_backward
amaru::ledger::state::ROLL_BACKWARD.description: Roll backward to a specific point

amaru::ledger::state::ROLL_FORWARD.name: roll_forward
amaru::ledger::state::ROLL_FORWARD.description: Roll forward ledger state with a new block

amaru::ledger::state::VOLATILE_TO_STABLE.name: volatile_to_stable
amaru::ledger::state::VOLATILE_TO_STABLE.description: Persist the oldest volatile block to stable storage once the security parameter is reached

amaru::stores::consensus::ROLLBACK_CHAIN.name: rollback_chain
amaru::stores::consensus::ROLLBACK_CHAIN.description: Rollback the chain to a point

amaru::stores::consensus::ROLL_FORWARD_C.name: roll_forward_chain
amaru::stores::consensus::ROLL_FORWARD_C.description: Roll forward the chain to a point

amaru::stores::ledger::columns::ACCOUNTS.name: accounts_reset_delegation
amaru::stores::ledger::columns::ACCOUNTS.description: Clear DRep delegation for accounts (protocol v9 bug compat)

amaru::stores::ledger::columns::ACCOUNTS.name: accounts_reset_many
amaru::stores::ledger::columns::ACCOUNTS.description: Reset rewards counters for many accounts

amaru::stores::ledger::columns::ACCOUNTS.name: accounts_set
amaru::stores::ledger::columns::ACCOUNTS.description: Update rewards balance for a single account

amaru::stores::ledger::columns::DREPS_SE.name: dreps_set_valid_until
amaru::stores::ledger::columns::DREPS_SE.description: Refresh DRep expiry after a vote
